name: Metallographic Phase Area Fraction Analysis
description: You are a metallurgical engineer analyzing a gold-lead-tin alloy. Your task is to quantify the volume fraction of the three distinct phases in the microstructure using the 'AuPbSn 40' sample image. The phases are distinguished by brightness: the Gold-rich phase (brightest), the Intermetallic phase (medium), and the Matrix phase (darkest). Segment the image based on grayscale intensity thresholds to measure the area and calculate the area fraction (%) for each phase. Save the results to a CSV file at ~/ImageJ_Data/results/phase_fractions.csv containing columns for Phase Name, Threshold Range, Area (pixels), and Area Fraction (%). Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
